title: Love, Wandering Thro' The Golden Maze.
content:
Love, wandering through the golden maze
        Of my beloved's hair,
    Traced every lock with fond delays,
        And, doting, lingered there.
    And soon he found 'twere vain to fly;
        His heart was close confined,
    For, every ringlet was a tie--
        A chain by beauty twined.
meaning:
Thomas Moore's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Love, Wandering Thro' The Golden Maze."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
